nonRetirementStatement: Tree-native artifacts are not deleted or physically retired by this status artifact. Todo Search selected-slice tree-native artifacts are now deprecated fallback/reference records, not source for graph-source-backed read-model generation; Todo App and repo-wide tree-native artifacts remain compatibility, fallback, and reference records unless a later explicit retirement decision changes that role.
nonEnforcementStatement: This status artifact supports local validation and repo-side CI observation only. It does not configure GitHub branch protection, merge enforcement, source-authority expansion, or user acceptance.

candidateOptions.label: Keep informational only
candidateOptions.recommendedUse: Default until a user explicitly approves a stronger required-check policy.

candidateOptions.label: Soft-required health/E2E candidate
candidateOptions.requiredCheckEffect: named package script and GitHub Actions job exist; branch protection is not configured
candidateOptions.recommendedUse: Use as the first possible required-check scope only if branch protection is explicitly approved and the waiver/failure policy is accepted.

candidateOptions.label: Full validate-all + health + E2E + intent-report candidate
candidateOptions.recommendedUse: Do not enable until Candidate B has been reviewed or the user explicitly accepts broader blocking semantics.

approvalRequiredBefore: configuring branch protection to require Candidate B
turning Candidate B into a merge gate
treating health or validate-all as user acceptance
blockingGaps: no explicit user approval for branch protection
waiver/failure policy is documented but not accepted as a branch-protection policy
tree-native retirement remains not approved and must stay separate from enforcement readiness

invalidFixtureBoundary: Invalid read-model fixtures remain local focused test inputs and are not enrolled in positive validate-all or CI.

retirementReadinessCriteria.description: Configured slice generation is graph-source-backed and stable for the slice under review.
The slice has projection/read-model parity pass or an explicitly accepted structure-only status.
Registry-backed validate-all reports aggregate-pass for the positive configured slices.
The local E2E smoke passes, including intentReport coverage with no missing classification or anchor counts.
Manual and PR informational CI observation have both reviewed the relevant status fields as passing.
Rollback/fallback criteria are documented and the current fallback/reference artifacts remain available.
User acceptance and source-authority boundaries are explicit and cannot be replaced by CI or generated Evidence.
No stale Evidence, hidden retained warning, blocking status, or decision-required status is concealed from review.
A later explicit user-approved retirement action is in scope and names replacement, fallback, and review points.

retirementReadinessSummary.boundary: Narrow Todo Search fallback/reference deprecation mechanics only; no tree-native artifact is deleted, no file is retired, Todo App remains structure-only not-ready, and repo-wide retirement remains not-ready.

wouldRetireOrDeprecateIfApproved: tree-native selected-slice operational-source role for Todo Search read-model generation
retirementApprovalPackages.rollbackPath: Use source-authority rollback/fallback plan; tree-native selected-slice artifacts remain present and can be restored from deprecated fallback/reference to operational source if graph-source interpretation is blocked or rejected.
evidenceReferences: manual and PR CI observation pass

retirementApprovalPackages.rollbackPath: Keep canonical .pbe artifacts as compatibility/fallback/reference; no retirement path is eligible until source authority beyond structure-only is separately approved.
evidenceReferences: manual and PR CI observation pass

retirementApprovalPackages.rollbackPath: No repo-wide retirement path is eligible; keep tree-native artifacts as compatibility/fallback/reference and require a separate migration/rollback package before any future approval.
evidenceReferences: manual and PR CI observation pass for configured slices

retirementReadiness.blockingReason: Tree-native selected-slice artifacts are deprecated fallback/reference and not source for Todo Search read-model generation, but files remain present and destructive retirement/deletion approval is still missing.
Todo App is confirmed structure-only graph-source-backed, but source authority beyond structure-only and explicit retirement approval are not approved.
